User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information and wallet balance details.

walletBalance.description: Current wallet balance in Nigerian Naira (₦)

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the profile was created

Transaction.title: Transaction Log
Transaction.description: A ledger record of a wallet top-up, airtime, data, TV, or electricity purchase.

userId.description: The unique reference to the logged-in User

recipient.description: Destination phone number, meter number, or decoder ID

amount.description: The payment value of the transaction

details.description: Human-readable description of the payment action

status.description: The current resolution state of the service

createdAt.description: The exact time the transaction occurred

reference.description: Unique alphanumeric reference code for tracking

users/{userId}.description: Enables creation and retrieval of user-specific profile structures.

transactions/{transactionId}.description: Maintains an active historic ledger of all virtual payment activities.
